refactor(web): heroicons Tier 3 batch 6c — final 37 wrappers (geometric drift + simple renames) (#1369)

## Summary

PR 6c — **final Tier 3 migration**. Closes the heroicons migration epic.
After this, wrapper count: **69 → 32** (terminal state: 24 skip + 5
defer + 3 Tooltip).

Spec:
[`docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-heroicons-migration.md`](docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-heroicons-migration.md).
Driven by `decisions.md`. Follows #1363/#1364/#1365/#1366/#1367/#1368.

**Diff: 70 files, +212 / -802 (net -590 lines).**

## Migrated wrappers (37)

### Geometric drift (per user visual review)
| old wrapper | v2 | note |
|---|---|---|
| `LinkIcon` | `WrenchIcon` | wrapper had Lucide wrench geom, not chain
|
| `GlobeIcon` | `RocketLaunchIcon` | wrapper had rocket-launch path, not
globe |
| `ClipboardCopyIcon` | `Square2StackIcon` | 2-rect overlap matches
Square2Stack |
| `FrameIcon` | `ViewfinderCircleIcon` | 4 L-corner brackets (+
crosshair) |
| `PhoneIcon` | `DevicePhoneMobileIcon` | Material iPhone shape |
| `ReceiptIcon` | `ReceiptPercentIcon` | zigzag receipt + diagonal |
| `CalendarLinedIcon` | `CalendarIcon` | (per user override of spec L87)
|
| `CodeBrackets` / `CodeSlash` | `CodeBracketIcon` | both → v2 `</>`
(with slash) |

### Standard renames (28)
ChatBubble · CircleAdd · EyeThin · FileFeather · GlobeFeather ·
ImageFrame · InfoCircleLine · LinkChain(V2) · ListIcon · LockIcon ·
MusicNote · PaperPlane(Small) · Paperclip · PencilIcon · PhotoV2 ·
RectangleVideo · ReloadIcon · SearchIcon · SettingsCog/Gear ·
SidebarCollapse/Expand · SparklesSmall · UploadIcon · VideoFeather ·
WarningCircle

## Codemod hardening (3 new fixes)

### 1. JSX rename file-scoped (critical fix)
Previous logic was global per-file — would corrupt files that imported
v2 `LinkIcon` (chain) from heroicons when migrating wrapper-named
`LinkIcon` (wrench geom) to `Wrench`.

**Fix**: track `wrappersInThisFile` set during import processing — JSX
rename + default-className injection only run for wrappers actually
imported from `@/components/ui/icons` in this file.

Verified: `AgentDetailClient.tsx` keeps its `<LinkIcon>` (heroicons
chain) unchanged; `ClawPageHeader.tsx` correctly renames its
wrench-shaped `<LinkIcon>` to `<WrenchIcon>`.

### 2. Pattern A regex tightened
`\s*=\s*` was too permissive — matched JSX `className="..."` (no spaces
around `=`) in addition to default param `className = '...'` (spaces
required). For `SidebarCollapseIcon`, this incorrectly captured the
inline animation classes.

**Fix**: `\s+=\s+` requires whitespace around `=` (only default-param
syntax).

### 3. Barrel comment regex lazy
`[^*]*` failed when the comment contained `**` (e.g. `canvas/**
(legacy)` glob in `@public` annotations). Lazy `[\s\S]*?` correctly
handles inner `*` characters.

## Manual fixes

- `SideNav.tsx`: aliased `PlusCircleIcon as PlusCircleOutlineIcon` from
`/24/outline` to coexist with `PlusCircleIcon` from `/24/solid` (PR 6b's
AddCircleFilled migration). Both are visually distinct.
- `ModelSelector.unit.spec.tsx`: 2 path-prefix asserts updated `M → m`
(heroicons v2 uses lowercase relative move at start).
- `index.ts`: cleaned orphan comment fragment from `@public canvas/**`
block (codemod regex bug surfaced + fixed in this PR).

## Stats

| | |
|---|---|
| Files changed | 70 |
| Caller files modified | 30 |
| Wrapper files deleted | 37 |
| Insertions | 212 |
| Deletions | 802 |
| Net | **-590 lines** |
| Default classNames auto-injected | 10 |

## Test plan

- [x] `node scripts/migrate-heroicons-batch.mjs` cleanly ran
- [x] `pnpm lint --fix` pass
- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` pass
- [x] `pnpm lint:ci` pass
- [x] `pnpm vitest run` — 4183 / 4184 pass (1 flaky test in
MarkdownContent — passes in isolation, unrelated; known issue tracked in
repo memory)
- [ ] **Visual on staging** — biggest geometric changes:
  - `<WrenchIcon>` (was Lucide wrench-named-LinkIcon in ClawPageHeader)
  - `<RocketLaunchIcon>` (was wrapper-named-GlobeIcon)
  - `<Square2StackIcon>` (was ClipboardCopy)
  - `<ViewfinderCircleIcon>` (was Frame's 4-corners)
  - `<DevicePhoneMobileIcon>` (was Material PhoneIcon)
  - `<ReceiptPercentIcon>` (was Receipt — has % accent)
  - `<Cog6ToothIcon>` (Settings family, both Cog and Gear consolidated)
  - 2 ChevronDouble for sidebar collapse/expand
  - Many smaller renames (Pencil/Lock/MusicalNote/PaperClip etc.)

## Final status

| PR | Status | Wrappers after |
|---|---|---|
| #1363 PR 1 | ✅ | 162 → 158 |
| #1364 PR 2 | ✅ | 158 → 114 |
| #1365 PR 4 | ✅ | cleanup |
| #1366 PR 5 | ✅ | review tooling |
| #1367 PR 6a | ✅ | 114 → 99 |
| #1368 PR 6b | ✅ | 99 → 69 |
| **PR 6c (this)** | 🟡 | **69 → 32** |
| PR 7 (future, optional) | — | 5 deferred
(LockFeather/ShieldCheckFeather/Volume\*/UserCheck — branded module
review) |

**Terminal state: 32** = 24 skip bucket (brands/animated/mascots) + 5
defer (branded modules) + 3 Tooltip indicators.

162 → 32 wrappers, **-130 wrappers** total, ~80% reduction. Heroicons v2
standardization complete.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
refactor(web): heroicons Tier 3 batch 6b — 30 wrappers (variant collapse + simple renames) (#1368)

## Summary

PR 6b — second Tier 3 migration batch. Validates codemod automation at
scale (vs PR 6a's 15-wrapper pilot) and clears most variant-collapse
families.

Spec:
[`docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-heroicons-migration.md`](docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-heroicons-migration.md).
Driven by `decisions.md`. Follows #1363/#1364/#1365/#1366/#1367.

**Diff: 71 files, +142 / -582 (net -440 lines, 30 wrapper deletions).**

## Migrated wrappers (30)

### Same-name outline (4)
ChevronRight · Clock · ExclamationTriangle · QuestionMarkCircle

### Solid /24 (6)
| old wrapper | v2 (in /24/solid) |
|---|---|
| `AddCircleFilledIcon` | `PlusCircleIcon` |
| `EllipsisHorizontalIcon` | `EllipsisHorizontalIcon` |
| `HeartSolidIcon` | `HeartIcon` |
| `PlayIcon` | `PlayIcon` |
| `StopSquareIcon` | `StopIcon` |
| `WarningTriangleSolidIcon` | `ExclamationTriangleIcon` |

### Variant collapse → single v2 (19)
- `Check{Large,Polyline,Small,Thin}` → `CheckIcon` (4)
- `ChevronDown{Large,Polyline}` → `ChevronDownIcon` (2)
- `ChevronLeftSmall` → `ChevronLeftIcon`
- `ChevronRight{Small,Tiny}` → `ChevronRightIcon` (2)
- `Clock{Bold,Feather}` → `ClockIcon` (2)
- `Close{Line,LineThick,Micro,Tiny}` → `XMarkIcon` (4)
- `Download` · `DownloadFeather` · `DownloadFeatherBold` →
`ArrowDownTrayIcon` (3)
- `DollarSign` → `CurrencyDollarIcon`
- `EmailEnvelope` → `EnvelopeIcon`

## Codemod automation working as designed

All 3 protections from PR 6a now active and verified:

1. **Default className preservation** — 4 wrappers in this batch had
defaults; script auto-injected:
   - `CloseLineIcon` (`h-4 w-4`)
   - `CloseLineThickIcon` (`h-3.5 w-3.5`)
   - `DollarSignIcon` (`h-5 w-5`)
   - `EmailEnvelopeIcon` (`h-5 w-5`)
2. **Same-path import merging** — 0 duplicate `from
'@heroicons/react/24/...'` lines in output
3. **ESLint cache bust** — auto-deleted at end of run; lint --fix ran
fresh

## Test plan

- [x] `node scripts/migrate-heroicons-batch.mjs` cleanly migrated 30
wrappers across 39 caller files
- [x] `pnpm lint --fix` pass (post cache bust)
- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` pass
- [x] `pnpm lint:ci` (knip + dep-health hard gate) pass
- [ ] **Visual on staging** — biggest changes:
  - 4 close-button variants now uniform `<XMarkIcon>`
  - 4 check variants now uniform `<CheckIcon>`
  - Solid Heart/Play/Stop family
- `DollarSign` → `CurrencyDollar` (`$` → `$` in circle, geometry change)
  - `EmailEnvelope` → `Envelope` (geometry: card+@ → envelope)
  - Download arrow now `arrow-down-tray` (file with tray)
  - Clock variants uniform
  - Chevron variants uniform

## Roadmap

- PR 6a (#1367) ✅ — 15 wrappers pilot
- **PR 6b (this)** — 30 wrappers variant-collapse + simple renames
- PR 6c — ~37 wrappers including geometric drift (Globe→Rocket,
Link→Wrench, ClipboardCopy→Square2Stack, Code\* family,
Frame→ViewfinderCircle, etc.)
- PR 7 (future) — 5 deferred branded-module wrappers
(LockFeather/ShieldCheckFeather + Volume + UserCheck), needs design
review

Wrapper count: 99 → **69** after this. Final shape (~32) = 24 skip
bucket + 5 defer + 3 Tooltip skip.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
refactor(web): heroicons Tier 3 batch 6a — 15 same-name outline migrations (#1367)

## Summary

PR 6a — pilot batch of the Tier 3 heroicons migration. Validates the
codemod approach on 15 lowest-risk wrappers (same name in v2,
/24/outline, no strokeWidth caveat) before scaling to ~67 remaining
migrations in PR 6b/6c.

Spec:
[`docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-heroicons-migration.md`](docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-heroicons-migration.md).
Driven by decisions in
[`2026-04-25-heroicons-tier3-decisions.md`](docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-heroicons-tier3-decisions.md).
Follows #1363/#1364/#1365/#1366.

**Diff: 28 files, +214 / -277 (net -63 lines after counting new codemod
script).**

## Migrated wrappers (15 same-name)

ArchiveBox · ArrowUp · ArrowUpCircle · ArrowRightOnRectangle · BookOpen
· Calendar · Camera · Clipboard · CommandLine · CreditCard · Cube ·
RectangleStack · ShieldCheck · ShoppingCart · Sparkles

All identity renames (no JSX rename needed); only the import path
changes from `@/components/ui/icons` to `@heroicons/react/24/outline`.

## Codemod tooling

New `scripts/migrate-heroicons-batch.mjs` (reusable for 6b/6c):

1. Walk `web/src/` for files importing wrappers from
`@/components/ui/icons`
2. Split each matching import: remove migrating names, leave untouched
names alone
3. Add new `@heroicons/react/<dir>` imports — **merging into existing
same-path import lines if present** (avoids duplicate `from
'@heroicons/react/24/outline'` lines)
4. Rename JSX `<Old>` → `<New>` (no-op for same-name batch)
5. Delete wrapper files + remove barrel exports
6. Run `pnpm lint --fix` to normalize alphabetical sort within import
braces

To run for next batch: edit the `BATCH` array in the script, run, lint,
commit.

## Stats

| | |
|---|---|
| Files changed | 28 |
| Caller files modified | 11 |
| Wrapper files deleted | 15 |
| Barrel exports removed | 15 |
| Insertions | 214 (mostly new codemod script ~125 lines) |
| Deletions | 277 (wrapper files + barrel lines) |
| Net | -63 |
| `strokeWidth` 补救 added | 0 (option C policy: accept v2 default 1.5) |

## Test plan

- [x] `node scripts/migrate-heroicons-batch.mjs` ran cleanly: 11 files
updated, 15 wrappers deleted, 15 barrel exports removed
- [x] `pnpm lint --fix` pass (alphabetical sort applied)
- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` pass (after clearing stale `.next/types/`)
- [x] `pnpm lint:ci` (knip + dep-health) pass
- [ ] **Visual on staging** — spot check biggest changes:
  - `<UserMenu>` (5 icons batch-merged into existing heroicons import)
  - `<SideNav>` (5 icons too)
  - `/claw-settings` save button + clipboard
  - chat input `<UploadPopover>` and `<GenClawInput>`
  - `/session-history` archive panel
  - `<ModelSelector>` and `<InvoiceHistory>`

## Roadmap

- **PR 6a (this)** — 15 wrappers pilot
- **PR 6b** — ~30 renamed-but-stable wrappers (Hashtag/Heart/Plus
families plus a few solid variants)
- **PR 6c** — ~37 wrappers including the geometric-rename mappings
(Globe→RocketLaunch, Link→Wrench, ClipboardCopy→Square2Stack, Code\*
family, etc.)
- **PR 7 (future)** — 5 deferred branded-module wrappers
(LockFeather/ShieldCheckFeather + Volume + UserCheck), needs design
review for landing/onboarding/pricing context

Wrapper count progression: 162 (start) → 114 (PR 1+2+4) → **99 after
this PR** → ~32 after full Tier 3 + branded review wraps up (24 skip
bucket + 5 defer + 3 Tooltip skip).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

tools: heroicons Tier 3 review HTML generator + decisions template (#1366)

## Summary

Generator + outputs for **side-by-side visual review** of the 90
remaining Tier 3 wrappers vs their Heroicons v2 candidates.
Self-contained static HTML, no dev-server needed — checkout +
double-click → browser.

Spec:
[`docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-heroicons-migration.md`](docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-heroicons-migration.md).
Follows #1363 / #1364 / #1365 (Tier 1 + Tier 2 + cleanup all merged).

## What's included

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `scripts/generate-heroicons-tier3-review.mjs` | Generator — pure Node,
walks `web/src/` once, indexes file contents in memory, emits HTML +
markdown |
| `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-heroicons-tier3-review.html` | 90
cards, side-by-side current SVG vs v2 candidate SVG, grouped by
category, stroke variant toggle |
| `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-heroicons-tier3-decisions.md` |
Markdown table — fill in per-wrapper decisions (`migrate` / `delete` /
`skip` / `defer` / `migrate-other:<Name>`) |

## Stats from this generation

- 90 Tier 3 candidates
- 🟢 **86** with v2 candidates ready
- 🟡 **0** dead code (all are still imported from `@/components/ui/icons`
somewhere)
- 🔴 **4** no v2 match: 3 Tooltip arrow indicators + 1
`DownloadFeatherBoldIcon` (mapping refinement candidate)

## How to use after merge

```bash
git checkout main
git pull
# Open the HTML in your browser:
open docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-heroicons-tier3-review.html  # macOS
# or just double-click the file in your file browser

# Review each card visually. Toggle stroke=1.5 (v2 default, option C from PR 2)
# vs stroke=2 (old wrapper) at the top.

# Fill in decisions:
$EDITOR docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-heroicons-tier3-decisions.md
git add docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-heroicons-tier3-decisions.md
git commit -m "review(heroicons): tier 3 decisions"
```

Future Tier 3 PRs read decisions.md to drive the actual codemod (not in
this PR).

## Decision options (recap)

| Option | Meaning |
|---|---|
| `migrate` | Accept the candidate, delete wrapper, replace callers |
| `migrate-other:<Name>` | Use a different v2 icon (e.g.
`migrate-other:ArrowUturnLeft`) |
| `delete` | Wrapper is dead code (0 callers from
`@/components/ui/icons`), just delete |
| `skip` | Keep wrapper, visual diverges too much from v2 candidate |
| `defer` | Unsure, revisit in next round |

Stroke policy is **option C from PR 2**: accept v2 default
`strokeWidth=1.5` for migrated icons. Keep explicit strokeWidths at
callsites only when they encode design intent (e.g. `={3}` bold check).

## Implementation notes

- **No `child_process.exec`**: walks `web/src/` once with `readdirSync`
recursive and indexes contents in memory. Avoids 90 grep subprocess
calls + safer per the security hook.
- **v1→v2 name mapping**: spec L191-208 + Heroicons release notes +
name-based heuristics in `V1_TO_V2` table. Any miscategorization is
surfaced visually in the HTML — reviewer flags as
`migrate-other:<correct>` in decisions.md.
- **Re-runnable**: deterministic output; future runs produce a stable
diff that only reflects actual wrapper changes.
- **PR size**: HTML + decisions.md live under `docs/superpowers/specs/`
which is excluded from PR-size-check (per `pr-size-check-reusable.yml`).
Effective code change is ~440 lines (the generator).

## Test plan

- [x] `node scripts/generate-heroicons-tier3-review.mjs` produces 90
cards / 142KB HTML / 112-line markdown
- [x] HTML opens cleanly in browser (verified locally — single file, all
SVG inlined)
- [x] Stroke toggle works (CSS-only, no JS framework)
- [x] Sample cards render correctly: ChevronDownLargeIcon →
ChevronDownIcon, EyeThinIcon → EyeIcon, MagnifyingGlassIcon, etc.
- [ ] **No code in `web/` changed** — this is purely review tooling

## Migration roadmap status

- **PR 1** #1363 ✅ Tier 1 byte-exact (4 wrappers)
- **PR 2** #1364 ✅ Tier 2 v1→v2 (44 of 45 wrappers, ReplyArrow deferred)
- **PR 4** #1365 ✅ cleanup (CLAUDE.md / lucide-react removal /
ReplyArrow comment)
- **PR 5** (this) — Tier 3 review tooling
- **PR 6+** (future) — Tier 3 actual migration, batched per category
from decisions.md

refactor(web): heroicons migration cleanup (PR 4) (#1365)

## Summary

PR 4 of the heroicons migration (spec:
[`docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-heroicons-migration.md`](docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-heroicons-migration.md),
follows #1363 / #1364).

Wraps up Tier 1 + Tier 2 work with three small follow-ups before Tier 3
starts.

**Diff: 5 files, +15 / -21 (net -6 lines).**

## Changes

### 1. `web/CLAUDE.md` Icons 段落 — 改写
The old rule (`不要替换为外部图标库 ... 存量图标统一走 ui/icons/ 自建 wrapper 路线`) was
explicitly overridden by the migration spec; PR 1 + PR 2 already
replaced 48 wrappers with `@heroicons/react@2`. New text:

- **新图标**: 优先 `@heroicons/react@^2.2.0`（`import { XMarkIcon } from
'@heroicons/react/24/outline'`）。不再新建 `ui/icons/` wrapper 路线。
- **自托管 wrapper**: 仅限 brand logos / 动画 spinner / mascots / 自定义品牌设计
token。
- **stroke 默认值**: 接受 v2 stroke=1.5 默认（Tier 2 option C 决策）；设计 intent 显式
stroke 保留。
- 历史 + skip 列表（`ReplyArrowIcon`）链回 spec。

### 2. `ReplyArrowIcon` — 永久 wrapper 注释
v2 dropped the `reply` icon family entirely. Closest match
`ArrowUturnLeftIcon` is a different u-turn shape, not a reply glyph.
Tracked as "skip" in the spec. Added a header comment explaining why
future audits should not migrate it.

### 3. `lucide-react` removed
Was only used by `canvas/ZoomControls.tsx` for 3 icons:

| lucide | heroicons v2 (/24/outline) |
|---|---|
| `Maximize` | `ArrowsPointingOutIcon` |
| `Minus` | `MinusIcon` |
| `Plus` | `PlusIcon` |

`lucide-react@0.577.0` removed from `web/package.json`; lockfile dropped
12 lines. One fewer npm dep to track for security advisories /
Dependabot.

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm lint` pass
- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` pass (after clearing stale `.next/types/`
artifact)
- [x] `pnpm lint:ci` (knip + dep-health hard gate) pass — note
dep-health remains green after lucide removal
- [ ] **Visual on staging**: bottom-right of `/canvas` page — zoom
controls. Heroicons `ArrowsPointingOut` is corner-arrows-out (similar to
lucide `Maximize` but slightly different stroke style); `Minus` / `Plus`
should look near-identical at 16px.

## Migration roadmap status

- **PR 1** (#1363) ✅ merged — Tier 1 byte-exact pilot (4 wrappers)
- **PR 2** (#1364) ✅ merged — Tier 2 v1→v2 (44 of 45 wrappers)
- **PR 4** (this) — cleanup
- **PR 3** (Tier 3, 89 semantic-only wrappers) — separate per-glyph
product review series, no commit yet

162 → 117 self-hosted wrappers after Tier 1 + Tier 2; this PR doesn't
change that count (CLAUDE.md + comment + zoom-controls migration only).

commit.message:
refactor(web): migrate Tier 2 — 44 wrappers to @heroicons/react v2 (#1364)

## Summary

PR 2 of the heroicons migration (spec:
[`docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-heroicons-migration.md`](docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-heroicons-migration.md),
follows #1363).

Replaces **44 of 45** self-hosted Tier 2 wrappers with direct imports
from `@heroicons/react@^2.2.0`. `ReplyArrowIcon` deferred — Heroicons v2
dropped the `reply` icon family entirely.

**Diff: 113 files, +278 / -866 (net -588 lines, 44 wrapper deletions).**

Two commits:
1. `0e35821f1` — initial migration with 37 strokeWidth={2}补救 sites
2. `2e21afeac` — drop those补救 per option C decision (accept v2 stroke
1.5 as part of Tier 2 drift, consistent with spec's "统一图标风格" goal)

## Migration breakdown

### Group A — same name, /24/outline (19 wrappers, no JSX rename)
ArrowDown · Bolt · CheckCircle · Check · ChevronDown · ChevronLeft ·
ChevronUp · Eye · Folder · Hashtag · Inbox · Moon · PencilSquare · Photo
· PlayCircle · Plus · Sun · Trash · VideoCamera

### Group B — renamed, /24/outline (19 wrappers)
| old | new |
|---|---|
| `ChatBubbleDotsIcon` | `ChatBubbleLeftEllipsisIcon` |
| `ChevronRightPathIcon` | `ChevronRightIcon` |
| `CloseIcon` | `XMarkIcon` |
| `DocumentBlankIcon` | `DocumentIcon` |
| `DocumentLinedIcon` | `DocumentTextIcon` |
| `DuplicateIcon` | `DocumentDuplicateIcon` |
| `GiftBoxIcon` | `GiftIcon` |
| `InfoCircleIcon` | `InformationCircleIcon` |
| `LinkChainBoldIcon` | `LinkIcon` |
| `LoginIcon` | `ArrowRightOnRectangleIcon` |
| `MenuBarsIcon` | `Bars3Icon` |
| `PhoneCallIcon` | `PhoneIcon` |
| `PlusLargeIcon` | `PlusIcon` |
| `RefreshIcon` | `ArrowPathIcon` |
| `SearchPlusIcon` | `MagnifyingGlassPlusIcon` |
| `TrendingUpIcon` | `ArrowTrendingUpIcon` |
| `UsersGroupIcon` | `UserGroupIcon` |
| `WarningCircleTallIcon` | `ExclamationCircleIcon` |
| `WarningTriangleIcon` | `ExclamationTriangleIcon` |

### Group C — solid mini, /20/solid (6 wrappers)
| old | new (in /20/solid) |
|---|---|
| `BoltSolidIcon` | `BoltIcon` |
| `CheckSolidIcon` | `CheckIcon` |
| `ChevronDownSolidIcon` | `ChevronDownIcon` |
| `CoinIcon` | `CurrencyDollarIcon` |
| `InfoSolidIcon` | `InformationCircleIcon` |
| `AlertSolidIcon` | `ExclamationCircleIcon` |

### Skipped — stays as wrapper
- `ReplyArrowIcon`: Heroicons v2 dropped `reply`. Decision deferred to
Tier 3 review or perma-wrapper.

## Visual policy: accept v2 stroke 1.5 as Tier 2 drift

Most v1-derived wrappers had `strokeWidth={2}` (hardcoded or as prop
default). Heroicons v2 default is `1.5`. **This PR accepts the thinner
stroke** as part of the v1→v2 visual unification the spec explicitly
opted into ("统一图标风格").

Pre-existing explicit `strokeWidth` values that encoded specific design
intent are **preserved unchanged**:
- `ImagePreview.tsx` `strokeWidth={1.5}` (intentionally thin close)
- `DailyTaskList.tsx` `strokeWidth={3}` (intentionally bold check)
- `DailyTaskList.tsx` `strokeWidth={1.5}` (intentionally thin bolt)

Sun/Moon are passed as `icon: SunIcon` value-refs through `ThemeToggle`;
the value-ref render relies on heroicons v2 default stroke 1.5.

PR #1363 (Tier 1 byte-exact pilot) is unaffected — those wrappers are
v2-byte-identical and already render at v2 default 1.5.

## Name collision handling

Several wrappers' v2 names collide between outline and solid
(`BoltIcon`, `CheckIcon`, `ChevronDownIcon`, `InformationCircleIcon`,
`ExclamationCircleIcon`). Files importing both use `as` alias:
```ts
import { CheckIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline'
import { CheckIcon as CheckSolidIcon } from '@heroicons/react/20/solid'
```
Affected files: `SuccessClient`, `AssetsPanel`, `SelectField`,
`ModelSelector`, `LoginForm`, `user/verify/page`.

## Bundle size (measured on commit 1, ≈ unchanged after rollback)

Same-worktree comparison vs main (PR 1 merged):

| | `.next/static/chunks` total |
|---|---|
| main | 18,208,815 bytes |
| this PR | 18,259,848 bytes |
| **delta** | **+51,033 bytes (0.28%)** ≈ 1.16KB / icon |

Tree-shake working as expected. Cumulative across PR 1 + PR 2: 48 icons
→ +51,696 bytes (~1.08KB/icon).

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm lint` pass
- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` pass (after clearing stale `.next/types/`
artifact — gitignored)
- [x] `pnpm lint:ci` pass
- [x] `pnpm test:unit` — 4182 tests pass
- [x] `pnpm build` — webpack compile pass; SSG prerender unrelated
Firebase API key error (same on main)
- [x] **Staging deploy**: `ecap-v0.6.44-beta` (latest with stroke=1.5
default) — auto-deploys for visual verification
- [ ] **Visual on staging** — spot-check biggest visual changes:
- 23 sites of `<XMarkIcon>` (formerly `<CloseIcon>` with stroke=2 → now
1.5)
  - `MenuBarsIcon` → `Bars3Icon` mobile sidebar (stroke 2→1.5)
  - Theme toggle (Sun/Moon stroke 2→1.5)
- 10 sites of `<ArrowPathIcon>` (formerly `<RefreshIcon>` — chevron-arc
geometry)
- `<DocumentDuplicateIcon>` copy buttons (formerly Duplicate — different
overlap)
  - Admin tools, modals, agent management

## Out of scope / follow-up

- `ReplyArrowIcon` migration decision (Tier 3 candidate or
perma-wrapper)
- Tier 3 — 89 semantic-only wrappers (per-glyph product review, separate
timeline)
- `web/CLAUDE.md` Icons section update (PR 4 cleanup) — current rule
"preserve byte-for-byte" is explicitly overridden by spec for Tier 2

follows #1363).

Replaces **44 of 45** self-hosted Tier 2 wrappers with direct imports
from `@heroicons/react@^2.2.0`. `ReplyArrowIcon` deferred — Heroicons v2
dropped the `reply` icon family entirely.

**Diff: 113 files, +278 / -866 (net -588 lines, 44 wrapper deletions).**

Two commits:
1. `0e35821f1` — initial migration with 37 strokeWidth={2}补救 sites
2. `2e21afeac` — drop those补救 per option C decision (accept v2 stroke
1.5 as part of Tier 2 drift, consistent with spec's "统一图标风格" goal)

## Migration breakdown

### Group A — same name, /24/outline (19 wrappers, no JSX rename)
ArrowDown · Bolt · CheckCircle · Check · ChevronDown · ChevronLeft ·
ChevronUp · Eye · Folder · Hashtag · Inbox · Moon · PencilSquare · Photo
· PlayCircle · Plus · Sun · Trash · VideoCamera

### Group B — renamed, /24/outline (19 wrappers)
| old | new |
|---|---|
| `ChatBubbleDotsIcon` | `ChatBubbleLeftEllipsisIcon` |
| `ChevronRightPathIcon` | `ChevronRightIcon` |
| `CloseIcon` | `XMarkIcon` |
| `DocumentBlankIcon` | `DocumentIcon` |
| `DocumentLinedIcon` | `DocumentTextIcon` |
| `DuplicateIcon` | `DocumentDuplicateIcon` |
| `GiftBoxIcon` | `GiftIcon` |
| `InfoCircleIcon` | `InformationCircleIcon` |
| `LinkChainBoldIcon` | `LinkIcon` |
| `LoginIcon` | `ArrowRightOnRectangleIcon` |
| `MenuBarsIcon` | `Bars3Icon` |
| `PhoneCallIcon` | `PhoneIcon` |
| `PlusLargeIcon` | `PlusIcon` |
| `RefreshIcon` | `ArrowPathIcon` |
| `SearchPlusIcon` | `MagnifyingGlassPlusIcon` |
| `TrendingUpIcon` | `ArrowTrendingUpIcon` |
| `UsersGroupIcon` | `UserGroupIcon` |
| `WarningCircleTallIcon` | `ExclamationCircleIcon` |
| `WarningTriangleIcon` | `ExclamationTriangleIcon` |

### Group C — solid mini, /20/solid (6 wrappers)
| old | new (in /20/solid) |
|---|---|
| `BoltSolidIcon` | `BoltIcon` |
| `CheckSolidIcon` | `CheckIcon` |
| `ChevronDownSolidIcon` | `ChevronDownIcon` |
| `CoinIcon` | `CurrencyDollarIcon` |
| `InfoSolidIcon` | `InformationCircleIcon` |
| `AlertSolidIcon` | `ExclamationCircleIcon` |

### Skipped — stays as wrapper
- `ReplyArrowIcon`: Heroicons v2 dropped `reply`. Decision deferred to
Tier 3 review or perma-wrapper.

## Visual policy: accept v2 stroke 1.5 as Tier 2 drift

Most v1-derived wrappers had `strokeWidth={2}` (hardcoded or as prop
default). Heroicons v2 default is `1.5`. **This PR accepts the thinner
stroke** as part of the v1→v2 visual unification the spec explicitly
opted into ("统一图标风格").

Pre-existing explicit `strokeWidth` values that encoded specific design
intent are **preserved unchanged**:
- `ImagePreview.tsx` `strokeWidth={1.5}` (intentionally thin close)
- `DailyTaskList.tsx` `strokeWidth={3}` (intentionally bold check)
- `DailyTaskList.tsx` `strokeWidth={1.5}` (intentionally thin bolt)

Sun/Moon are passed as `icon: SunIcon` value-refs through `ThemeToggle`;
the value-ref render relies on heroicons v2 default stroke 1.5.

PR #1363 (Tier 1 byte-exact pilot) is unaffected — those wrappers are
v2-byte-identical and already render at v2 default 1.5.

## Name collision handling

Several wrappers' v2 names collide between outline and solid
(`BoltIcon`, `CheckIcon`, `ChevronDownIcon`, `InformationCircleIcon`,
`ExclamationCircleIcon`). Files importing both use `as` alias:
```ts
import { CheckIcon } from '@heroicons/react/24/outline'
import { CheckIcon as CheckSolidIcon } from '@heroicons/react/20/solid'
```
Affected files: `SuccessClient`, `AssetsPanel`, `SelectField`,
`ModelSelector`, `LoginForm`, `user/verify/page`.

## Bundle size (measured on commit 1, ≈ unchanged after rollback)

Same-worktree comparison vs main (PR 1 merged):

| | `.next/static/chunks` total |
|---|---|
| main | 18,208,815 bytes |
| this PR | 18,259,848 bytes |
| **delta** | **+51,033 bytes (0.28%)** ≈ 1.16KB / icon |

Tree-shake working as expected. Cumulative across PR 1 + PR 2: 48 icons
→ +51,696 bytes (~1.08KB/icon).

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm lint` pass
- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` pass (after clearing stale `.next/types/`
artifact — gitignored)
- [x] `pnpm lint:ci` pass
- [x] `pnpm test:unit` — 4182 tests pass
- [x] `pnpm build` — webpack compile pass; SSG prerender unrelated
Firebase API key error (same on main)
- [x] **Staging deploy**: `ecap-v0.6.44-beta` (latest with stroke=1.5
default) — auto-deploys for visual verification
- [ ] **Visual on staging** — spot-check biggest visual changes:
- 23 sites of `<XMarkIcon>` (formerly `<CloseIcon>` with stroke=2 → now
1.5)
  - `MenuBarsIcon` → `Bars3Icon` mobile sidebar (stroke 2→1.5)
  - Theme toggle (Sun/Moon stroke 2→1.5)
- 10 sites of `<ArrowPathIcon>` (formerly `<RefreshIcon>` — chevron-arc
geometry)
- `<DocumentDuplicateIcon>` copy buttons (formerly Duplicate — different
overlap)
  - Admin tools, modals, agent management

## Out of scope / follow-up

- `ReplyArrowIcon` migration decision (Tier 3 candidate or
perma-wrapper)
- Tier 3 — 89 semantic-only wrappers (per-glyph product review, separate
timeline)
- `web/CLAUDE.md` Icons section update (PR 4 cleanup) — current rule
"preserve byte-for-byte" is explicitly overridden by spec for Tier 2

## Summary

PR 1 of the heroicons migration (spec:
[`docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-heroicons-migration.md`](docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-heroicons-migration.md)).

Replaces 4 byte-exact-Heroicons-v2 self-hosted wrappers with direct
imports from `@heroicons/react@^2.2.0` and removes the now-unused
wrapper files. **Zero-risk pilot** — every replaced wrapper was already
byte-identical to the corresponding `@heroicons/react@2` outline icon.

| wrapper (deleted) | replacement | callers |
|---|---|---|
| `ArrowUturnLeftIcon` |
`@heroicons/react/24/outline/ArrowUturnLeftIcon` | `CanvasToolbar.tsx` |
| `ArrowUturnRightIcon` | `ArrowUturnRightIcon` | `CanvasToolbar.tsx` |
| `ClockCircleIcon` | `ClockIcon` (rename) | `UpgradePromptModal.tsx` |
| `PlusThinIcon` | `PlusIcon` (rename) | `CanvasTopBar.tsx`,
`AgentBindingsSection.tsx` |

## strokeWidth caveat

Our `PlusThinIcon` defaulted to `strokeWidth={2}` while Heroicons
`PlusIcon` defaults to 1.5. To preserve the existing visual:

- `CanvasTopBar.tsx` — kept the existing explicit `strokeWidth={1.5}`
(now redundant w/ Heroicons default; left as-is for minimal-change
clarity).
- `AgentBindingsSection.tsx` — added explicit `strokeWidth={2}` (was
relying on the wrapper default of 2; without this prop the "Add Channel"
+ would silently render thinner).

## Bundle size

Tree-shake validated. Comparison on the same Next.js / cache, only diff
is heroicons dep + 4 callers:

| | `.next/static/chunks` total |
|---|---|
| main | 18,208,122 bytes |
| this PR | 18,208,785 bytes |
| **delta** | **+663 bytes (0.0036%)** |

Spec threshold for PR 1 was 50KB — passes by ~75x margin. Confirms
`@heroicons/react@2` is fully ESM-tree-shakable in the Next.js 15 /
OpenNext setup. Safe to proceed to PR 2 (Tier 2: 45 wrappers, 493
callers).

## CLAUDE.md note

`web/CLAUDE.md` Icons section (`不要替换为外部图标库 ... 存量图标统一走 ui/icons/ 自建
wrapper 路线`) is explicitly overridden by the heroicons migration spec.
CLAUDE.md update is deferred to PR 4 (cleanup) per the spec roadmap.

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm lint` pass
- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` (full repo) pass
- [x] `pnpm lint:ci` (knip + shrink-only gates) pass
- [x] `pnpm build` — compile pass (`✓ Compiled successfully in 67s`);
SSG prerender fails on dev-container Firebase API key (unrelated;
reproduced same way on main)
- [ ] **Visual on staging** — reviewer spot check
(`ecommerce-studio-web-staging.chris-a5e.workers.dev`):
  - canvas toolbar undo/redo (Uturn icons)
- canvas top-bar "new" + button (PlusIcon `strokeWidth={1.5}`, was
wrapper-default-2 → user override 1.5; now heroicons-default 1.5 +
explicit prop)
  - upgrade prompt modal clock (ClockIcon byte-exact)
- agent-bindings "Add Channel" + button (PlusIcon `strokeWidth={2}` —
**most important: confirm same thickness as main**)

commit.message:
docs: heroicons migration + provider-logo migration specs (#1362)

## Summary
Adds two design specs to \`docs/superpowers/specs/\`:

### 1. \`2026-04-25-heroicons-migration.md\` (new — drives next session)
4-PR plan to migrate up to 138 of 162 self-hosted \`ui/icons/\` wrappers
to \`@heroicons/react@^2.2.0\`. Captures the full audit context so a
fresh session can pick up the work directly:

- **Tier 1** (4 byte-exact wrappers): zero visual risk pilot — installs
dep + replaces ArrowUturnLeft/Right, ClockCircle, PlusThin
- **Tier 2** (45 v1→v2 path matches): accepted visual drift (Heroicons
redrew every icon in v2, 0/167 outline paths byte-stable)
- **Tier 3** (89 semantic-only matches): each wrapper needs per-glyph
review (e.g., \`FrameIcon\` → \`rectangle-stack\` is a stylistic
compromise; \`CalendarLinedIcon\` is actually bar-chart geometry, not
calendar)
- **Skip** (24): 8 brand logos + 5 animated/spinners + 11 mascots/custom

Includes: v1→v2 rename table, Heroicons v2 React component API notes
(Object.assign(defaults, props) → strokeWidth overridable via prop),
bundle/knip/ESLint impact analysis, reproducible analysis script setup
under \`/tmp/svg-research/\` (curl + tar commands to rebuild Heroicons +
Feather + Lucide catalogs), per-Tier validation requirements, risk table
with mitigations.

### 2. \`2026-04-25-provider-logo-svg-migration.md\` (already executed)
ProviderLogo subdirectory migration spec from earlier in the svg-inline
series. Already landed via #1357 + #1358 — checking in for completeness
alongside the new heroicons spec.

## Context
Follows the svg-inline epic (22 PRs) and the Phase A/B dedup series
(#1359/1360/1361, 182→162 wrappers). Current main is at 162 self-hosted
\`ui/icons/\` wrappers; this spec evaluates whether ~85% can move to a
single library.

## Test plan
Specs only — no code change.

refactor(web): consolidate 3 three-variant stroke svg wrapper clusters (#1361)

## Summary
**Phase B PR 2 of 2** (followup to #1360). Same consolidation pattern: 3
clusters where 3 wrappers shared identical path/viewBox geometry but
differed only in `strokeWidth` — replace each cluster with a single
wrapper exposing `strokeWidth` as an optional prop.

**Visual zero risk**: rendered SVG byte-identical (the strokeWidth
attribute is just controlled via prop instead of hardcoded literal).

## Cluster merges

| Kept | Default | Deleted (variant) |
|---|---|---|
| `CheckIcon` | 2 | `CheckBoldIcon` (2.5), `CheckHeavyIcon` (3) |
| `DownloadIcon` | 1.5 | `DownloadMidIcon` (1.75), `DownloadThickIcon`
(2) |
| `DocumentBlankIcon` | 2 | `FileGenericIcon` (1.75),
`DocumentBlankThinIcon` (1.5) |

## Caller migrations
8 callsite updates across 7 files. Every former `<XBoldIcon />` /
`<FileGenericIcon />` / etc. becomes `<XIcon strokeWidth={N} />`.

## knip @public cleanup
`DocumentBlankIcon` was tagged `@public` (consumed only by
`ExampleShowcase/**`, knip-ignored). After consolidation it has
non-ignored consumers (`workspace-shared`, `MyUploadsTab`,
`UploadPopover`, `FallbackRenderer`), so the `@public` tag and comment
are removed.

## Series total
- 168 → **162 wrappers** (-6)
- **Phase B series complete** — started at 182 wrappers:
  - Phase A (#1359): -3 byte-duplicate pairs
  - Phase B PR 1 (#1360): -11 two-variant stroke clusters
  - Phase B PR 2 (this PR): -6 three-variant stroke clusters
  - **Total: -20 wrappers (~11% reduction)**

## Test plan
- [x] `pnpm lint` clean (1 prettier auto-fix applied)
- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` clean
- [x] `pnpm lint:ci` (knip + shrink-only) clean
- [ ] Visual spot-check on staging: ConnectorsSection check
(stroke=2.5), DailyTaskList past-task check (stroke=3), AssetPreviewArea
download (stroke=1.75), canvas/AssetsPanel download (stroke=2), file
list rows (stroke=1.75 documents), FallbackRenderer empty-state
(stroke=1.5)

commit.message:
refactor(web): consolidate 11 stroke-variant svg wrapper clusters (#1360)

## Summary
**Phase B PR 1 of 2** from a clustering audit (script in
`/tmp/svg-research/cluster.mjs`). 11 clusters where multiple wrappers
shared identical path/viewBox geometry but only differed in
`strokeWidth` — replace each cluster with a single wrapper exposing
`strokeWidth` as an optional prop (defaulting to the most-used value).

**Visual zero risk**: the rendered SVG is byte-identical to the original
wrapper output; the `strokeWidth` attribute is just controlled via prop
instead of hardcoded literal. The earlier "wrapper is the safest path"
guidance from `feedback_wrapper_reuse_byte_exact` applies to *Tailwind
className overrides* — JSX prop → SVG attribute is consistent across
browsers.

## Cluster merges (kept ← deleted, default → variant)

| Kept | Default | Deleted | Variant |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ChevronDownIcon` | 2 | `ChevronDownThinIcon` | 1.5 |
| `ChevronDownLargeIcon` | 1.5 | `ChevronDownLargeThickIcon` | 2 |
| `CloseIcon` | 2 | `CloseThinIcon` | 1.5 |
| `BoltIcon` | 2 | `BoltThinIcon` | 1.5 |
| `EyeThinIcon` | 1.5 | `EyeUltraThinIcon` | 1 |
| `FolderIcon` | 1.75 | `FolderThickIcon` | 2 |
| `PhotoIcon` | 1.5 | `PhotoThickIcon` | 2 |
| `PlusThinIcon` | 2 | `PlusV2Icon` | 1.5 |
| `RefreshIcon` | 2 | `RefreshThinIcon` | 1.75 |
| `PaperclipIcon` | 1.75 | `PaperclipThinIcon` | 1.5 |
| `ArrowUpCircleIcon` | 1.75 | `ArrowUpCircleThinIcon` | 1.5 |

## Caller migrations
~16 callsite updates across 15 files: every former `<XThinIcon />`
becomes `<XIcon strokeWidth={N} />` matching the deleted variant's
strokeWidth.

## Impact
- **179 → 168 wrappers** (-11)
- Phase B PR 2 will handle the 3 3-variant clusters (Check,
DocumentBlank, Download) for ~6 more

**Visual zero risk**: the rendered SVG is byte-identical to the original
wrapper output; the `strokeWidth` attribute is just controlled via prop
instead of hardcoded literal. The earlier "wrapper is the safest path"
guidance from `feedback_wrapper_reuse_byte_exact` applies to *Tailwind
className overrides* — JSX prop → SVG attribute is consistent across
browsers.

| Kept | Default | Deleted | Variant |
|---|---|---|---|
| `ChevronDownIcon` | 2 | `ChevronDownThinIcon` | 1.5 |
| `ChevronDownLargeIcon` | 1.5 | `ChevronDownLargeThickIcon` | 2 |
| `CloseIcon` | 2 | `CloseThinIcon` | 1.5 |
| `BoltIcon` | 2 | `BoltThinIcon` | 1.5 |
| `EyeThinIcon` | 1.5 | `EyeUltraThinIcon` | 1 |
| `FolderIcon` | 1.75 | `FolderThickIcon` | 2 |
| `PhotoIcon` | 1.5 | `PhotoThickIcon` | 2 |
| `PlusThinIcon` | 2 | `PlusV2Icon` | 1.5 |
| `RefreshIcon` | 2 | `RefreshThinIcon` | 1.75 |
| `PaperclipIcon` | 1.75 | `PaperclipThinIcon` | 1.5 |
| `ArrowUpCircleIcon` | 1.75 | `ArrowUpCircleThinIcon` | 1.5 |

## Caller migrations
~16 callsite updates across 15 files: every former `<XThinIcon />`
becomes `<XIcon strokeWidth={N} />` matching the deleted variant's
strokeWidth.

- Phase B PR 2 will handle the 3 3-variant clusters (Check,
DocumentBlank, Download) for ~6 more

commit.message:
refactor(web): dedup 3 byte-identical svg wrapper pairs (#1359)

## Summary
A clustering audit of all 182 `ui/icons/` wrappers found **3 pairs**
that are byte-identical SVG content under different filenames — pure
historical accidents, no semantic distinction.

## Pairs deduped (each → kept name)

| Deleted | Kept | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| `ChatHelpIcon` | `ChatBubbleOvalDotsIcon` | `ChatHelpIcon` was a
callsite-driven name (UserMenu's "Help" button) for what is structurally
Heroicons v2 chat-bubble-oval-left-ellipsis. UserMenu's "Help" semantic
comes from the surrounding text label, not the glyph. |
| `HelpInfoIcon` | `QuestionMarkCircleIcon` | Heroicons official name
wins over the vague "HelpInfo". |
| `SmallSpinnerIcon` | `SpinnerArcIcon` | Identical 270° arc at
stroke=2.5; SpinnerArcIcon (3 callers) wins over SmallSpinnerIcon (1
caller). Notably `SpinnerArcIcon`'s own comment claimed it was "distinct
from SmallSpinnerIcon" — wasn't. |

This is the same class of problem as the `OpenSidePanelIcon` /
`RectangleVideoIcon` reuse-miss fixed in #1355 — naming wrappers from
callsite intent instead of geometry creates duplicates.

## Caller updates (3 files)
- `UserMenu.tsx`: `ChatHelpIcon` → `ChatBubbleOvalDotsIcon`,
`HelpInfoIcon` → `QuestionMarkCircleIcon`
- `AgentSettingsPopover.tsx`: `SmallSpinnerIcon` → `SpinnerArcIcon`

## Stale comment cleanup
- `ChatBubbleOvalDotsIcon`: dropped "consumed only by canvas/**" +
`@public` tag (UserMenu now also imports it, reachability is direct)
- `SpinnerArcIcon`: dropped reference to deleted `SmallSpinnerIcon`
- `QuestionMarkCircleIcon`: dropped "Used in SubscriptionPanel" (now
multiple consumers)

## Impact
- **182 → 179 wrappers** (-3 files)
- **Visual zero risk**: rendered SVGs are byte-identical; only filename
+ import path changes
- This is Phase A of a 2-phase consolidation plan. Phase B
(stroke-variant consolidation, ~17 more files saveable) requires API
design (default strokeWidth choice + caller updates) and warrants a
separate PR.

## Test plan
- [x] `pnpm lint` clean
- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` clean
- [x] `pnpm lint:ci` (knip + shrink-only) clean
- [ ] Visual spot-check on staging: UserMenu (Help icon next to "Help" +
chat bubble at bottom), SubscriptionPanel Add-on tooltip,
AgentSettingsPopover loading spinner

refactor(web): ProviderLogo — extract first 15 brand logos (1/2) (#1357)

## Summary
Per spec
[docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-provider-logo-svg-migration.md](docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-provider-logo-svg-migration.md)
PR 1.

Extracts 15/30 brand logos from `ProviderLogo.tsx` (456 lines, 30 inline
`<svg>`) into `src/components/ui/icons/providers/` subdirectory. Path /
viewBox / `<defs>` gradient ids preserved byte-for-byte.

**Logos extracted (15)**:
- With `<defs>`/gradient (validates SVG defs migration): Instagram,
Jira, Confluence
- Social: Facebook, TwitterX, YouTube, TikTok, LinkedIn, Discord
- Work: Slack, Notion, Stripe, Gmail, GoogleCalendar, GoogleSheets

LOGO_MAP entries unchanged — references resolve to imports for the 15
extracted logos and inline functions for the remaining 15. **PR 2** will
finish the rest and remove `ProviderLogo.tsx` from the svg-inline
SHRINK-ONLY baseline.

## Sub-directory choice (Option C from spec)
- **ESLint auto-exempt**: existing `ui/icons/**` permanent ignore is
recursive, no config change needed
- **Namespace isolation**: prevents conflict with existing
`ui/icons/LinkedInLogoIcon.tsx` (PublicFooter, currentColor) and
`ui/icons/DiscordLogoIcon.tsx` — those use currentColor, these use
brand-color fills
- **Caller stability**: `ProviderLogo`'s public API unchanged;
ConnectorsSection / IntegrationsSection callers untouched
- **knip satisfied**: `import { Brand } from './ui/icons/providers'` is
named import, knip tracks reachability

## Wrapper convention
- **Zero-prop functions** matching original inline (ProviderLogo's
`<span>` controls outer sizing via className; wrapper keeps intrinsic
`width=20 height=20`)
- `providers/index.ts` is a self-contained barrel; **NOT** re-exported
from main `ui/icons/index.ts` to keep brand-logo namespace separate

## Diff stats
- ProviderLogo.tsx: 456 → 240 lines (-216)
- 15 new wrapper files @ ~12 lines avg + 1 barrel = +272
- Net: +56 lines (one-time growth from per-file overhead; PR 2 will cut
another ~140 from ProviderLogo.tsx)
- Baseline: **unchanged** (12 → 12, ProviderLogo.tsx still has 15 inline
svgs and stays on baseline until PR 2)

## Test plan
- [x] `pnpm lint` clean
- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` clean
- [x] `pnpm lint:ci` (knip + shrink-only) clean
- [x] `bash web/scripts/check-svg-ignores-shrink-only.sh` — main: 12,
HEAD: 12 ✅
- [ ] Visual spot-check on staging `/claw-settings`: verify all 15
extracted logo tiles render identically (Instagram gradient,
Jira/Confluence facets, brand colors)

`CanvasTopBar`, `ChatPanel`, `ImageNode`, `VideoNode`) into named
wrappers.

PaperPlaneIcon, DownloadThickIcon×2).

`canvas/**` is in `knip.config.ts` ignores, so wrappers consumed only by
canvas/ files would otherwise be flagged as "unused exports" (per
`feedback_knip_ignore_reachability.md` — wrapper source + barrel
re-export both need `@public`). Applied to all 6 new wrappers. Reused
wrappers already have non-canvas consumers so they don't need the tag.

(24x24, stroke=1.5)
- `PhotoV2Icon` — Heroicons v2 photo (`M2.25 15.75l5.159-5.159...`);
distinct from PhotoIcon (Heroicons v1)
- `OpenSidePanelIcon` — Heroicons v2 rectangle-stack-arrow-out
- `PlusV2Icon` — Heroicons v2 full-span plus at stroke=1.5; distinct
from PlusThinIcon (same path at stroke=2)
- `ChatBubbleOvalDotsIcon` — Heroicons v2
chat-bubble-oval-left-ellipsis; distinct from ChatBubbleDotsIcon /
ChatBubbleAntIcon

## Test plan
- [x] `pnpm lint` clean

knip false positives

refactor(web): svg-inline — AssetPreviewArea (1 file, 4 svgs) (#1354)

## Summary
- Migrates 4 inline `<svg>` out of
`assets/components/AssetPreviewArea.tsx` into named wrappers.
- All 4 svgs use deliberately tuned stroke widths (`1.75` for the
preview-header action buttons at h-4 w-4, `1` for the empty-state
placeholder at h-12 w-12 with `text-muted-foreground/40`). Reusing
existing wrappers at stroke=1.5 or 2 would shift those weights, so 4 new
wrappers are added even though 3 paths are byte-equal to existing
wrappers.

## New wrappers (4)
- `RefreshThinIcon` — RefreshIcon's path at stroke=1.75 (vs stroke=2)
- `LinkChainV2Icon` — Heroicons v2 link geometry, stroke=1.75; distinct
from LinkChainIcon (Heroicons v1)
- `DownloadMidIcon` — DownloadIcon's path at stroke=1.75 ("mid" between
DownloadIcon's 1.5 and DownloadThickIcon's 2)
- `EyeUltraThinIcon` — EyeThinIcon's 2 paths at stroke=1 (vs 1.5)

refactor(web): svg-inline — agents-manager (2 files, 7 svgs) (#1352)

## Summary
- Migrates 7 inline `<svg>` out of `agents-manager/`
(`AgentsManagerClient.tsx` + `[id]/AgentDetailClient.tsx`) into named
wrappers.
- Adds 6 new wrappers: `ChatBubbleAntIcon`, `EllipsisHorizontalIcon`,
`TrashIcon`, `BoltIcon`, `LinkChainBoldIcon`, `ClockBoldIcon`. Reuses
`RefreshIcon` (byte-exact match for the agent-update arrow loop).
- Path / viewBox / stroke kept byte-exact — no visual diff.
- Both files removed from `web/eslint.config.mjs` svg-inline SHRINK-ONLY
baseline (22 → 20).

## Naming
- Stroke=2 outlines pair with existing stroke=1.5 wrappers via `Bold`
suffix (matching `CheckBoldIcon` / `DownloadFeatherBoldIcon` precedent):
`LinkChainBoldIcon` ↔ `LinkChainIcon`, `ClockBoldIcon` ↔
`ClockCircleIcon`. `BoltIcon` (stroke=2) takes the unsuffixed name since
`BoltThinIcon` (stroke=1.5) and `BoltSolidIcon` (fill mini) already
squat the variants.
- `ChatBubbleAntIcon` flagged as Ant Design 1024x1024 style to
distinguish from existing `ChatBubbleDotsIcon` (Heroicons v1 24x24
rectangular bubble).

## Test plan
- [x] `pnpm lint` clean

- [x] `bash web/scripts/check-svg-ignores-shrink-only.sh` — main: 22,

detail page

commit.message: refactor(web): svg-inline — public/PublicFooter (1 file, 4 svgs) (#1351) ## Summary 继续 SVG 治理系列 (PR #21) — 单文件清理 \`src/components/public/PublicFooter.tsx\`,4 处 inline svg。svg-inline baseline **23 → 22**。 ### 迁移内容 - Discord brand logo → 复用 \`DiscordLogoIcon\` - LinkedIn brand logo → 新 \`LinkedInLogoIcon\` - Globe(语言切换器)→ 新 \`GlobeFeatherIcon\` - ChevronDown(语言下拉)→ 新 \`ChevronDownPolylineIcon\` ### 新增 wrapper (3) - \`LinkedInLogoIcon\` — single-path "in" 24x24 fill,caller 用 \`text-*\` className 控色 - \`GlobeFeatherIcon\` — Feather 地球(circle + 横线赤道 + 经线弧)stroke=2,与 \`GlobeIcon\`(Heroicons v2 复杂大陆轮廓单 path stroke=1.5)区分 - \`ChevronDownPolylineIcon\` — polyline \`6 9 12 15 18 9\` stroke=2.5,和所有 path-based ChevronDown* 区分(polyline 元素 vs path 是结构区分,跟 \`CheckPolylineIcon\` 是同样的考虑) ### 复用 \`DiscordLogoIcon\` 的小细节 源 svg 的 path 在 2 处有 \`1.095\` vs 现有 wrapper 的 \`1.096\` —— 0.001 SVG 坐标差异(transcription 精度伪差),实际渲染完全相同,任何尺寸下都不可见。沿用之前 \`CloseLineIcon\` 类似情况的 reviewer-approved 判断,reuse 而不是另起 wrapper。caller 用 \`className="text-white"\` 配合 wrapper 的 \`fill="currentColor"\`,等价于源 svg 的 \`fill="white"\`。 ### inline style → Tailwind 等价 源 svg 上的 \`style={{ opacity: 0.5 }}\` 和 \`style={{ opacity: 0.4 }}\` 改为 Tailwind \`opacity-50\` / \`opacity-40\`(byte-exact 等价)。 ## Test plan - [x] \`pnpm lint\` clean - [x] \`npx tsc --noEmit\` clean - [x] \`pnpm lint:ci\` clean (knip hard gates pass) - [x] \`bash scripts/check-svg-ignores-shrink-only.sh\` — 23 → 22 ✅ - [x] \`bash scripts/check-ignores-shrink-only.sh\` — 45 → 45 ✅ - [x] \`bash scripts/check-no-raw-fetch-shrink-only.sh\` — 0 → 0 ✅ - [ ] 视觉回归: \`/\` (公共 landing 页)的 footer: - 社交链接行的 Discord + LinkedIn 白色品牌 logo(注意 X / YouTube 是外部 \`\` 不变) - footer 底部语言切换器:globe icon(opacity-50)+ 当前 locale 名 + chevron-down(opacity-40) 🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code) Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context)

refactor(web): svg-inline — singletons round 3 (3 files, 8 svgs) (#1350)

## Summary

继续 SVG 治理系列 (PR #20) — 又一批小文件清理:
- \`Feedback/FeedbackDialog.tsx\` (2 svgs, 1 复用 + 1 新)
- \`settings/DiaryCards.tsx\` (2 svgs, 2 新)
- \`app/[locale]/user/verify/page.tsx\` (4 svgs, 2 复用 + 2 复用别名 — 即
BackIcon/ErrorIcon 本地 const 改成 ChevronLeftIcon/AlertSolidIcon 别名)

baseline **26 → 23**。

### 新增 wrapper (4)

- \`PaperPlaneSmallIcon\` — 18x18 viewBox stroke=1.2 paper plane 变体,与
\`PaperPlaneIcon\`(24x24 Heroicons v2 send glyph)区分
- \`ChevronLeftSmallIcon\` — 16x16 viewBox path \`M10 12L6 8L10 4\`
stroke=1.5,与 \`ChevronLeftIcon\`(24x24 stroke=2)区分,小尺寸下 chevron 占满更多
viewBox
- \`ChevronRightSmallIcon\` — 16x16 viewBox 配对 right chevron,与
\`ChevronRightTinyIcon\`(12x12)和 \`ChevronRightPathIcon\`(24x24)区分
- \`CheckCircleIcon\` — check 在 circle 内的单 path 合并版(\`M9 12l2 2 4-4m6
2a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z\`),与
\`ShieldCheckIcon\`(盾形)/\`ShieldCheckFeatherIcon\`(2-path
盾+check)区分:这个是纯圆圈 + 内部 check,没有盾形

### 复用 wrapper (4)

- \`CloseTinyIcon\` — FeedbackDialog 关闭 X(byte-exact 完全匹配 16x16 path
\`M4 4l8 8M12 4l-8 8\`)
- \`ChevronLeftIcon\` — verify 页 BackIcon 别名(本地 const 直接
\`<ChevronLeftIcon className="h-4 w-4" />\`)
- \`AlertSolidIcon\` — verify 页 ErrorIcon 别名(byte-exact 14x14 fill
solid)
- \`EmailEnvelopeIcon\` — verify 邮件状态(用 className="h-12 w-12" 覆盖 wrapper
内的 hardcoded 20px)

### 注:verify 页 BackIcon/ErrorIcon 本地 const

源代码里 \`BackIcon\` 和 \`ErrorIcon\` 是本地 \`const X = () => <svg.../>\`。改成
\`const X = () => <ReusedWrapper />\` 既保留 caller 的 \`<BackIcon />\`
API,又移除了 inline svg。和之前 PR #1341 admin/Spinner 的 \`SvgSpinner\`
thin-wrap pattern 一样。

## Test plan

- [x] \`pnpm lint\` clean
- [x] \`npx tsc --noEmit\` clean
- [x] \`pnpm lint:ci\` clean (knip hard gates pass)
- [x] \`bash scripts/check-svg-ignores-shrink-only.sh\` — 26 → 23 ✅
- [x] \`bash scripts/check-ignores-shrink-only.sh\` — 45 → 45 ✅
- [x] \`bash scripts/check-no-raw-fetch-shrink-only.sh\` — 0 → 0 ✅
- [ ] 视觉回归:
  - feedback dialog (intercom-like 弹出): 关闭 X + 输入框 send 按钮的 paper plane
  - settings 的 diary cards 横向 scroller 左右翻页
  - 邮箱 / 手机 verify 流程: 返回 chevron + 错误 alert + 成功 check-circle + 邮件信封大图

commit.message:
docs: React Query migration v2 spec (wrapper-bound useEffect → useQuery) (#1346)

## Summary

- Adds spec at
`docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-25-react-query-migration-v2.md`
- Tracks the ~34 client files that escaped the v1 (#1296-#1332) net
because they import `@/lib/api/*` helpers but still use `useEffect +
setState` — wrapper present, RQ semantics absent
- 6-PR plan, reuses all v1 infra (QueryClient, QUERY_VERSION, test
wrapper, normalizeError)

Tracking issue: #1347

## Why this exists

v1 measured itself against "raw `fetch()` in client code = 0", which it
achieved. But these 34 files were **never raw fetch** — earlier work had
already extracted them into `lib/api/*` wrappers. So the lint guard
never caught them, and the v1 sweep skipped them. They still:
- don't dedup across components
- don't cancel on unmount
- don't refetch on focus
- hand-roll loading/error state
- have no staleTime → effectively always-fresh local cache

## Test plan

- [ ] Spec doc only — no code changes, nothing to test
- [ ] Implementation work tracked under #1347

commit.message:
refactor(web): final cleanup + lint guard permanence (RQ PR 9) (#1332)

## Summary

**Final PR of the React Query migration.** Drains the last 5
transitional entries in the no-raw-fetch SHRINK-ONLY list — the list is
now empty, the ESLint guard is permanently on, and client-side
components contain zero raw \`fetch()\`.

### Migrations this PR

- **3 artifact renderers (Docx / Excel / Pptx)** — \`useEffect + fetch +
setState\` → \`useQuery\` via \`lib/api/artifact\`'s
\`fetchArtifactBlob\` / new \`fetchArtifactArrayBuffer\`. Docx splits
fetch (useQuery) from \`renderAsync\` (useEffect) because the DOM
mutation must rerun on every mount.
- **\`useResolvedUrl\`** — MM path goes through useQuery +
\`fetchMmBlob\` (shared with \`useAuthBlob\` from PR 2). Token in cache
key prevents cross-session leakage; \`gcTime: 0\` for large preview
blobs; MIME re-tagging preserved. \`reload()\` now invalidates the RQ
cache entry.
- **\`MarkdownContent\` download handler** — imperative DOM-listener
fetch → \`fetchArtifactBlob\` helper.
- **\`useSSEStream\`** — file-header comment explicitly labels it as the
**permanent SSE exception**. Long-lived stream with async event dispatch
+ manual reconnect doesn't fit useQuery/useMutation semantics; forcing
it would make RQ's retry/isPending machinery misleading. Don't use this
file as a template.

### Final state

- **SHRINK-ONLY (no-raw-fetch)**: 16 → 0 (sentinel markers kept for
future regression landing spots).
- **Permanent allowlist**: \`lib/api/**\` / \`lib/mattermost/**\` /
\`lib/skills/**\` / \`lib/upload.ts\` / \`lib/download.ts\` /
\`middleware.ts\` / \`app/api/**/route.ts\` / \`hooks/useSSEStream.ts\`.
- **Lint guard permanently on**: any new raw \`fetch()\` in \`src/**\`
outside the allowlist fails CI.

Spec updated:
[\`docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-24-react-query-migration.md\`](docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-24-react-query-migration.md)
— status ✅ 完成.

## Test plan

- [x] \`npx tsc --noEmit\` clean
- [x] \`pnpm lint\` clean
- [x] \`pnpm lint:ci\` clean
- [x] \`pnpm test:unit\` — 263 files / 4175 tests pass
- [x] \`check-no-raw-fetch-shrink-only.sh\` reports 5 → 0
- [ ] Local \`pnpm dev\`: open a chat with an .xlsx / .docx / .pptx
artifact + MM-sourced preview (pdf/html); confirm each renders correctly
with fresh fetches

## Summary

继续 SVG 治理系列 (PR #16) — 清理 \`src/app/landing/components/\` 下 3 个文件的 7 处
inline svg。svg-inline baseline **38 → 35**。

### 迁移文件 (3)
- \`LandingHero.tsx\` (2) — VolumeMuteIcon, VolumeOnIcon (demo player
mute toggle 两个状态)
- \`LandingSecurity.tsx\` (3) — ShieldCheckFeatherIcon, LockFeatherIcon,
UserCheckIcon (三张 security card 的图标)
- \`LandingSpecialists.tsx\` (2) — ChevronLeftIcon, ChevronRightPathIcon
(specialist 卡片左右翻页)

### 新增 wrapper (5)
全部 byte-exact 保留 path / viewBox / 等属性,命名与已有 wrapper 区分:

- \`VolumeMuteIcon\` — Feather "volume-x" outline (speaker polygon + 2 X
线)
- \`VolumeOnIcon\` — Feather "volume-2" outline (speaker polygon + 2
sound-wave 弧)
- \`ShieldCheckFeatherIcon\` — Feather shield + interior check 2-path
变体,与 \`ShieldCheckIcon\` (Heroicons v2 单 path) 区分
- \`LockFeatherIcon\` — Feather lock 用 rect + arch shackle,与
\`LockIcon\` (Heroicons v2 单 path) 区分
- \`UserCheckIcon\` — Feather user (head circle + shoulders arc) + check

### LandingSecurity 的 CSS 依赖

LandingSecurity 的 3 个 wrapper **刻意省略** \`stroke\` / \`fill\` /
\`strokeWidth\` / \`strokeLinecap\` 属性 —— landing 的 \`.landing-root
.security-icon svg\` CSS selector 通过父类提供这些(用
\`var(--landing-text-muted)\` token)。这对应了源 svg 也没写这些属性 —— 是 byte-exact
保留。每个 wrapper header 都注明了这个 CSS 依赖,如果在 \`.security-icon\` 之外复用需要 caller
自己提供 stroke 等。

### 复用 wrapper (2)

- \`GoogleColorLargeIcon\` — 48x48 viewBox 的 Google G 品牌 logo(4 色
path),与 \`GoogleColorIcon\`(24x24 v2 变体,LoginForm 用)刻意分开
- \`CheckBoldIcon\` — 同 CheckIcon path(\`M5 13l4 4L19 7\`)但
strokeWidth=2.5(vs 2),用于 readonly-option 在彩色 hover bg 上需要加重
- \`UploadIcon\` — Heroicons v2 arrow-up-tray (stroke=1.5)

### 复用 wrapper (5)
- \`CloseIcon\`(log viewer 关闭)
- \`ChevronDownIcon\`(collapse 切换)
- \`CheckSolidIcon\`(SaveButton saved 状态 — 20x20 fill path byte-exact
匹配)
- \`SpinnerArcIcon\` ×2(SaveButton saving + WorkspaceFilesSection
uploading)

### 跳过 DiagnosticsSection

\`components/DiagnosticsSection.tsx\` 有 1 个 svg 是 dynamic
sparkline/gauge chart(\`bgPath\` / \`fgPath\` / \`strokeWidth\` /
stroke-class 全是 data-driven),不是静态图标,更适合放进将来的 \`ui/charts/\` 命名空间而不是
\`ui/icons/\`。留在 svg-inline baseline,等 charts 专门 refactor 再处理。5 个文件中保留 1
个在 baseline。

X、Connectors section(Google tile 的 4 色 G + collapse chevron + readonly

feat(ios): Redesign paywall and sidebar UserCard to match Figma (#1297)

## Summary

Redesign the iOS paywall, sidebar UserCard, and chat UX with
Figma-matching designs and performance improvements.

### Paywall
- Remove Ultra plan — Pro is now the highest tier
- Both plans use comparison table layout (Free vs Starter, Free vs Pro)
with matching feature rows
- CTA button: "Get Starter" / "Get Pro" for free users, "Upgrade to ..."
for subscribers
- Trial badge ("7-Day Free Trial") overlaid on CTA button top-right (not
in feature card)
- Replace scrolling brand logos with marquee `paywall_models` image
- Pro plan monthly only (no yearly option)
- Remove savings labels, billed labels, /mo suffix from billing cards
- Fix Starter-to-Pro upgrade path — Starter subscribers land on Pro tab
- Feature card + billing cards + CTA scroll together; footer pinned at
bottom

### Paywall Gating (extracted to `PaywallGating` enum)
- `isHighestTier` blocks Pro/Ultra from paywall
- `initialPlanIndex` auto-advances to next tier for subscribers
- `ctaLabel` reflects selected plan name dynamically
- `shouldShowUpgradeButton` hides for Pro/Ultra in settings
- 45 tests covering all subscriber flow scenarios

### Sidebar UserCard
- Three-part layout: avatar | name + plan | upgrade button

### Chat UX
- Reduce scroll jumping with content-based height estimation and height
caching
- Pre-fetch image attachments for latest page on sync
- Sharpen photo picker thumbnails (screen-scale-aware, opportunistic
delivery)
- Square crop thumbnails with GeometryReader

### Other
- Opt-in `liquidGlass` flag on GlassButton for iOS 26 (`#if
swift(>=6.2)`)
- Fix redeem modal keyboard avoidance and smooth dismiss
- Increase default API timeout from 30s to 60s
- Upload dSYMs to Sentry via fastlane for crash symbolication
- Pass `SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN` in iOS deploy workflow

## Test plan
- [ ] Paywall: free user sees "Get Starter" with trial badge on CTA
button
- [ ] Paywall: Starter subscriber lands on Pro tab, CTA says "Upgrade to
Pro", no trial badge
- [ ] Paywall: Pro subscriber blocked — paywall auto-dismisses, no
upgrade button in settings
- [ ] Paywall: both plans show Free vs X comparison table with matching
rows
- [ ] Paywall: swipe between plans, billing cycle resets correctly
- [ ] Paywall: feature card + billing + CTA scroll on small screens
- [ ] Paywall: brand logos marquee scrolls smoothly
- [ ] Chat: scroll through long history — no repeated jumping
- [ ] Chat: images display instantly for recently fetched messages
- [ ] Photo picker: sharp square thumbnails
- [ ] Redeem modal: keyboard dismisses smoothly on close
- [ ] PaywallPlansTests + PaywallGatingTests pass (45 tests)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
